user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of letter templates, so that I can see the appointment, offer, joining and cancel offer letters
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When the list loads; Then each template shows its Template Type ID, Letter type and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual letter template, so that I can inspect its content before it is issued
acceptance_criteria: Given a letter template is listed; When I click View in the Task column; Then the template detail is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the letter template list, so that I see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
